title: Maintain own health to promote personal wellbeing in the wool harvesting industry
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Maintain own health to promote personal wellbeing in the wool harvesting industry demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.
